sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (haystack String, needle String, occurrences UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY haystack;
INSERT INTO test_strings (haystack, needle) VALUES ('Hello World', 'hello'), ('Test string for Testing', 'TEST');
SELECT countSubstringsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, needle) AS occurrences FROM test_strings;
UPDATE test_strings SET needle = 'example' WHERE haystack = 'Test string for Testing';
SELECT haystack, countSubstringsCaseInsensitiveUTF8(haystack, needle) AS total_occurrences FROM test_strings WHERE occurrences > 0;
